name: SAB-Delegate
displayDescription: Discord bot for HCMUS Student Activities Board server management. Needed to automate repetitive admin tasks for a large student organization Discord server. Features 14+ slash commands: attendance tracking by role, polls, birthday reminders, scheduled announcements, notes, word dictionary, bulk role assignment, message purge, and thread management. Contains TypeScript bot with discord.js v14, SQLite persistence via better-sqlite3, and Docker deployment. Supports multiple bot tokens. Used by SAB board officers.
